services.inspecciones_lead: Tax auditing, record regularization and defense in administrative and judicial channels. We detect fraud pockets and increase municipal revenue.
inspecciones_items: IBI · Cadastral inspection, regularizations and special procedures.
IAE · Detection of undeclared registrations and review of headings.
IIVTNU · Liquidation, refund and litigation after STC 182/2021.
ICIO · Checking of works, self-assessments and reimbursements.
Fees and public prices · Cost analysis and update proposal.
services.juridica_lead: Comprehensive legal advice, reports, opinions and legal representation in all jurisdictions. Continuous or project-based assistance.
juridica_items: Public procurement: specifications, boards and appeals.
services.tecnica_lead: Urbanism, planning, licenses and municipal work projects with an integrating vision. Team of architects, engineers and urban technicians.
tecnica_items: Drafting and review of urban planning.
Building permits, activity licenses and responsible declarations.
Municipal urbanization and civil work projects.
services.economica_lead: Budgets, financial control, budgetary stability and sanitation plans. We work side by side with the municipal intervention.
economica_items: Preparation of the budget and budget modifications.
Liquidation, general account and reporting to the Court of Auditors.
services.energetica_lead: Energy audits, transition and efficiency in public buildings. Savings of 30-45% in energy bills and captured European funding.
energetica_items: Energy audits in public buildings and facilities.
Renewal of public lighting and efficiency.
Processing of IDAE grants and European funds.
services.inspecciones_short: Tax auditing, record regularization and defense in administrative channels.
services.juridica_short: Comprehensive legal advice, reports, opinions and legal representation.
services.tecnica_short: Urbanism, planning, licenses and municipal work projects.
services.economica_short: Budgets, financial control, stability and sanitation plans.
services.energetica_short: Energy audits, transition and efficiency in public buildings.

programas.title: Grants and European funds
programas.lead: Attraction, management and justification of Next Generation, ERDF, ESF+, MITECO, IDAE funds and regional calls. We work with your municipality throughout the entire grant cycle.

items.title: Next Generation EU
items.text: Recovery, Transformation and Resilience Plan. PERTE, MRR, transfers to local entities.

items.title: FEDER 2021-2027
items.text: Multiannual operational programs for infrastructure, digitalization and territorial cohesion.

items.title: EDUSI
items.text: Sustainable Urban Development Strategy. We capture and execute associated funds.

items.title: IDAE / MITECO
items.text: Calls for energy efficiency, self-consumption and sustainable mobility.

items.title: DUS 5000
items.text: Aid for municipalities with fewer than 5,000 inhabitants in energy transition.

items.title: Regional calls
items.text: Coverage in the 17 Autonomous Communities with monthly monitoring of opportunities.

contratacion.title: Comprehensive procurement assistance
contratacion.lead: Support throughout the public contract cycle: specifications, boards, execution and appeals. Solid, agile procedures shielded against challenges.
items: Drafting of administrative and technical specifications.
contratacion.cite: LCSP 9/2017, Community Directives and TACRC doctrine. Procedures shielded against appeals and contractual modifications.

video_showcase.title: Tax inspection with measurable results
video_showcase.lead: Complete audit of IBI, IAE and ICIO with an average increase in revenue of 12-18% without new fees for residents.

hero.title: Technical excellence at the service of administrations
hero.subtitle: We support town halls and public bodies with a multidisciplinary team of lawyers, economists, engineers and specialists.

services_section.title: Comprehensive solutions for every municipal challenge
services_section.subtitle: From tax inspections to the energy transition, we cover the full life-cycle of public management.

banner.title: Legal rigour, technical insight, strategic vision.
banner.text: Every town hall is unique. We design tailored plans combining compliance, budget efficiency and long-term foresight.

about.title: Over two decades advising the public sector
about.p1: Reglado Consultores was founded to be the technical ally of local administrations. Today we work with more than 200 town halls and public bodies across Spain.
about.p2: Our approach combines deep legal knowledge with the agility of private consultancy. The result: stronger, more efficient and more defensible public decisions.

stats.title: Results of a job well done

ordenanzas.title: Municipal tax modernisation
ordenanzas.subtitle: Review, drafting and defence of fiscal ordinances tailored to each local reality.

contact.title: Tell us about your case
contact.subtitle: We respond within 24 working hours. Initial consultations are free and confidential.
